results.title: Infinix Note 60 Pro Pininfarina Edition India Launch on June 24: Price, Specs, Features
results.description: Infinix is ​​set to launch a special edition smartphone in the Indian market. The company has officially confirmed that the Infinix Note 60 Pro Pininfarina Edition will launch in India on June 24 at 12 PM (IST). This limited-edition smartphone has been created in collaboration with Pininfarina, the renowned Italian design house famous for designing luxury sports cars. The upcoming smartphone combines premium styling with powerful hardware, making it an attractive choice for users who desire both performance and a unique design. Premium Design Inspired by Luxury Cars The standout feature of the Infinix Note 60 Pro Pininfarina Edition is its unique design. The smartphone boasts a carbon-fiber-inspired back panel and a 360-degree aerospace-grade aluminum frame, giving it a premium and futuristic look. The device will be available in a stylish black finish and is designed to stand out from the typical smartphones in its segment. The collaboration with Pininfarina adds a touch of luxury, a quality usually associated with high-end cars. Stunning Display The phone is expected to feature a 1.5K AMOLED display with a 144Hz refresh rate. This will provide users with vibrant colors, deep blacks, and an excellent viewing experience while gaming, scrolling, or watching videos. For durability, the display will be protected by Corning Gorilla Glass 7i, offering resistance against scratches and accidental drops. Processor The smartphone will be powered by Qualcomm's latest Snapdragon 7s Gen 4 chipset, built on an advanced 4nm architecture. This processor is designed to deliver excellent performance for gaming, multitasking, content creation, and everyday use. This chipset is expected to deliver superior power efficiency and faster processing speeds compared to previous-generation mid-range processors. Advanced 3D Ice Cool Cooling System To keep temperatures in check during intensive tasks, Infinix has equipped the phone with a 3D Ice Cool vapor chamber cooling system. This advanced cooling technology helps dissipate heat more effectively, ensuring stable performance during prolonged gaming sessions, video editing, and heavy multitasking. 6,500mAh Battery Battery life is another major highlight of this device. The Infinix Note 60 Pro Pininfarina Edition houses a massive 6,500mAh battery, allowing users to easily get through a full day of usage on a single charge. The smartphone supports 90W wired fast charging for rapid power-ups. It also features 30W wireless charging, a rarity in this price segment. 50MP Camera with OIS For photography, the smartphone features a 50MP primary rear camera equipped with Optical Image Stabilization (OIS). OIS helps minimize blur and enhance image quality, particularly in low-light conditions and during video recording. The phone is expected to sport a dual-camera setup on the back. Additionally, users will find Infinix's unique 'Active Matrix Rear Display' next to the camera module. This secondary display can show notifications, charging status, and other essential information. Availability Following its launch, the Infinix Note 60 Pro Pininfarina Edition will be available for purchase on Flipkart. The company has already launched a dedicated microsite detailing its key specifications and launch information. With its premium automotive-inspired design, powerful Snapdragon 7s Gen 4 processor, massive 6,500mAh battery, 144Hz AMOLED display, and 50MP OIS camera, the Infinix Note 60 Pro Pininfarina Edition appears to be an excellent blend of style and performance. For users seeking a smartphone that stands out from the crowd and offers flagship-like features, this limited-edition Infinix device could be a great choice.

results.title: IC Electricals Company Limited IPO (IC Electricals Company IPO)

Its product portfolio includes Electronic Rectifier-cum-Regulating Units (ERRU), Regulated Battery Chargers, Vigilance Control Devices (VCD), emergency lights, [...]

results.title: Flag Torn. Temple Mocked. Idol Targeted. Why Texas Has Become Ground Zero For Rising Anti-India Hate
results.description: A flag torn in broad daylight. A temple mocked online. A Ganesha idol removed on a realtor's advice. And a crowd cheering a man screaming "Go back to India" outside a Texas city hall. This is Frisco, one of the most prosperous Indian-American communities in the United States, and now the epicentre of a frightening surge in anti-India, anti-Hindu hostility. For months, MAGA-aligned influencers have been turning Frisco into a national flashpoint, framing Indian immigrants as economic invaders and Hindu temples as symbols of foreign takeover. Congressman Raja Krishnamoorthi has spoken up. But warnings rarely stop a wave already in motion. This video breaks down how the hate was built, who is building it, and what it means for the millions of Indian-Americans.

results.title: IIM Bangalore surpasses global average in Positive Impact Rating 2026, earns Level 5 status again
results.description: IIM Bangalore has achieved a score of 9.7 in the Positive Impact Rating (PIR) 2026, significantly higher than the global average of 8.0. The institute retained its Level 5 'Pioneering School' status for the fifth consecutive year, recognising sustained leadership in responsible management education. Based on nearly 20,000 student responses from 87 business schools worldwide, the rating highlights IIM Bangalore's strong performance in governance, culture, academic programmes, learning methods, student support, and public engagement.

results.title: 13, including 12 Indians, dead after explosion at Qatar’s Ras Laffan gas facility
results.description: Thirteen people, including 12 Indians, died in a Qatar gas facility explosion; 66 others were injured, prompting an investigation.
